title: Unifia game profile
description: Per-game behavior consumed by the launcher and written to the game as unifia_profile.json for the in-game mod.

netcode.description: Which netcode stack the game uses, selecting the right plugin family.

hookStrategy.description: When the mod injects its repoint. 'manual' = hotkey; 'auto-on-load' = after a delay; 'reconnect-on-load' = wrap the game's own connect call (Harmony, game-specific).

autoDelaySeconds.description: Delay before auto activation when hookStrategy is 'auto-on-load'.

supportsNativeLobby.description: Whether the game exposes a public room/region browser the mod can inject into (Level A). When false, players auto-join by room code (Level B).

connectionMode.description: 'cloud-region' keeps Photon Cloud but pins everyone to one region + room (no server/NAT, simplest cross-store). 'self-hosted' repoints the game at the host's own Photon server (direct IP).

region.description: Photon Cloud region all players are pinned to in cloud-region mode (e.g. eu, us, usw, asia, jp, au). Everyone must share one for matchmaking to converge.

connectHookType.description: For hookStrategy 'reconnect-on-load': fully-qualified type name whose method the mod patches (Harmony) to trigger activation.

connectHookMethod.description: For hookStrategy 'reconnect-on-load': method name on connectHookType to patch.

module.description: Which loader module this game needs.
